title: Building Monday.com apps no code development
excerpt:
I would like to create Monday Board/dashboard templates and/or Apps for Monday.com marketplace for a few use-cases that I have in mind. 
I do not have coding experience, rather, a product management background using NO-C…

posts.author: prozaro (Sam Prozaro)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to create Monday Board/dashboard templates and/or Apps for Monday.com marketplace for a few use-cases that I have in mind.

I do not have coding experience, rather, a product management background using NO-CODE /Integration tools.

I would like to understand the following:
Is programming experience needed for building apps?
Can i use no code building tools or create my boards in an account, and then have it hosted by Monday and sell on the marketplace?

Kindly, share any experience or suggestions on how to get cracking with building these templates/apps and contributing to the marketplace / end customers.

Many thanks.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The primary issue with the no-code platforms and apps is the management of the API keys/tokens and there being no way to avoid logging them without also turning off logging for everything else.

There are workarounds but I will say by the time you get to creating custom modules/functions in the no-code platform you are now basically coding them so it may be worth your effort to learn to code them. Javascript is easier than you think!

posts.author: prozaro (Sam Prozaro)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Cody. Do you know if its possible to add boards/dashboard reports/automations etc built on the Monday OS as a template project and sell it to others users in marketplace/template area? I’m not sure if we need to code this but just checking. Thank you!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are looking at just prebuilt templates with automations built on monday.com native automations (no apps included) you may be able to, I’d really suggest posting this in the developer section where you may get better responses. I know you can build apps that are just templates, I am not sure about selling them.

Where you’re at right now is the “how to use apps and integrations” for end users.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: we provide Automation, We are also the golden partner of Make Also, we implement it on Monday and Customise in MakeAnd we are also open to collaboration, which means we can provide our developer for your project.
